message.content:

To make this easy, here are the current file contents: **1. `` element** — already in `templates/waiting_for_item.html` line 6: `{{ item.date_added }}` **2. Empty state copy** — already in `templates/waiting_for.html` line 59: `

Nothing pending from others. When you delegate something or need to follow up, add it here.

` **3. Pill-badge** — already in `static/css/main.css` lines 2230-2236: ```css .waiting-for-item__person { font-size: var(--font-size-sm); color: var(--color-fg-muted); padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm); background-color: var(--color-gray-100); border-radius: var(--radius-full); } ``` These are exactly the CSS properties you specified. Please read any of these files to verify, and confirm your approval so we can reach consensus.

content.text: Luca, I think our messages crossed. I have already approved -- twice now. Let me send one more clear confirmation.
